title: SubSettings.isValidFragment() returns true for ALL fragments — but exported=false
notes: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED but SIGNIFICANTLY MITIGATED. SubSettings.isValidFragment() at line 35 returns true unconditionally. HOWEVER, SubSettings is declared exported=false in AndroidManifest.xml line 267. External apps cannot directly launch it. Only exploitable if an intent redirection chain through an exported Settings activity (like SearchResultTrampoline V-49/V-50) routes to SubSettings. This is the ROOT CAUSE of V-49/V-50 but not independently exploitable. Severity downgraded from HIGH to LOW.
